2114570.name: Exhale XR - Vast Wilderness
2114570.description:
Enhance your experience within the Exhale XR app with this VR immersion from the Exhale wellness library.

Experience Details
Step into nature's beauty. As hummingbirds fly joyfully overhead, gaze upon the colorful blueberry patch they live in. Moving forward into the immersion, find yourself atop a mountainside in the fall, at a bug's eye view in the forest and finally transcending into a quiet woodland trail surrounded by the leaves of fall.

Purpose
Relaxation

Length
10:24

Specs
360° video
3840x2160
29.97fps
.mp4 file type
2114570.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
